summary: Iteration 40 - Phase 3B+3C Features (POS/GL Hub, Live Layout Collaboration, VR/360 Walkthrough) PASSED. All 38 backend tests passed (100%). Fixed React hooks violation in POS & GL Hub panel. All 3 new panels verified with correct tabs and data rendering.

ui_bugs.issue: React hooks violation - useState called after conditional return

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed React hooks violation in PosGlHub/index.tsx - useState for 'connecting' was called after conditional return, moved before the early return
POS & GL Hub provides demo data for Toast POS (orders, menu) and QuickBooks (P&L, chart of accounts) - ready for real OAuth when API keys configured
Live Layout Collaboration supports real-time sessions with cursor sharing, edit history, and participant management via MongoDB
VR/360 Walkthrough seeds 4 demo tours on first access with scenes and hotspots support
All MongoDB collections properly queried with _id exclusion
Frontend uses proper data-testid attributes for all tabs and content sections

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all panels and tabs verified after fix)

seed_data_creation: VR tours auto-seed 4 demo tours on first access. Toast/QuickBooks connections created during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 40 verified Phase 3B+3C features. Backend: /api/pos-gl/* (status, toast/connect, toast/sync, toast/orders, toast/menu-sync, quickbooks/auth-url, quickbooks/connect, quickbooks/sync, quickbooks/chart-of-accounts, quickbooks/profit-loss, webhooks/toast, webhooks/quickbooks, sync-log, disconnect/{provider}), /api/collaboration/* (sessions CRUD, join, leave, cursor, edit, edits, end), /api/vr-walkthrough/* (tours CRUD, scenes, hotspots, room-configs). Frontend: POS & GL Hub panel has data-testid='pos-gl-hub-panel' with tabs posgl-tab-connections, posgl-tab-toast, posgl-tab-quickbooks, posgl-tab-sync-log. Live Layout panel has data-testid='live-layout-panel' with tabs live-tab-sessions, live-tab-live, live-tab-history. VR Walkthrough panel has data-testid='vr-walkthrough-panel' with tabs vr-tab-tours, vr-tab-viewer, vr-tab-configs.

QuickBooks P&L/chart of accounts (demo data - no real Intuit API)
mocked_apis.note: All integration data is hospitality-themed demo data. Backend is ready for real OAuth when Toast and QuickBooks API keys are configured.

bug_fix_applied.issue: React hooks violation - useState called after conditional return in ConnectionsTab
bug_fix_applied.fix: Moved useState for 'connecting' before the early return statement
bug_fix_applied.root_cause: React requires hooks to be called in the same order on every render. The conditional return before useState caused the hook order to change when status was null vs loaded.
